description: Create Dockerfiles for server, worker, and dashboard services plus root .dockerignore and production docker-compose
steps: Create .dockerignore in root with: node_modules, .git, dist, *.log, .env*, .volumes, coverage, .agents, k6, tests, examples, .github

Create server/Dockerfile as multi-stage build: Stage 1 (builder) uses node:22-alpine, copies root package.json, package-lock.json, shared/package.json, server/package.json, worker/package.json, dashboard/package.json, runs npm ci --workspace @nexusqueue/shared --workspace @nexusqueue/server, copies shared/ and server/ source, runs npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/shared && npm run build --workspace @nexusqueue/server. Stage 2 (runtime) uses node:22-alpine, copies node_modules and dist from builder for shared and server, exposes 3000, adds HEALTHCHECK using wget to /health, CMD ["node", "server/dist/index.js"]

Create worker/Dockerfile as multi-stage build: same builder pattern as server but for worker workspace. Stage 2 copies node_modules and dist, no EXPOSE, sets ENV for WORKER_QUEUE=default WORKER_CONCURRENCY=5, CMD ["node", "worker/dist/index.js"]. No HEALTHCHECK since worker only connects outbound.

Create dashboard/Dockerfile as multi-stage build: Stage 1 uses node:22-alpine, copies dashboard/ package files, runs npm ci, copies source, runs npm run build (vite build). Stage 2 uses nginx:alpine, copies dist/ from builder to /usr/share/nginx/html, creates nginx.conf for SPA routing (try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html), exposes 80

Create docker-compose.prod.yml with services: redis (redis:7-alpine, healthcheck, volume, internal network only), postgres (postgres:16-alpine, env from .env, healthcheck, volume, init SQL mounted, internal network only), server (build context server/, depends_on redis+postgres with condition service_healthy, env_file .env, ports 3000:3000, both networks), worker (build context worker/, deploy replicas 3, depends_on redis+postgres with condition service_healthy, env_file .env, internal network only), dashboard (build context dashboard/, ports 80:80, public network only). Define networks: internal (driver bridge) and public (driver bridge). Define volumes: redis-data, postgres-data.
acceptance_criteria: .dockerignore exists at root with sensible exclusions
server/Dockerfile is a valid multi-stage Dockerfile with HEALTHCHECK and EXPOSE 3000
worker/Dockerfile is a valid multi-stage Dockerfile with no EXPOSE, ENV vars for WORKER_QUEUE/WORKER_CONCURRENCY/WORKER_ID
dashboard/Dockerfile is a valid multi-stage Dockerfile using nginx:alpine for the final stage with SPA routing config
docker-compose.prod.yml defines all 5 services with proper networking, health checks, and volume configuration
Existing build and tests still pass
verification: Run npm run build to confirm existing code still builds
Run npm test to confirm all 92 tests still pass
